ddls:
CREATE TABLE "timing_specifications" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing specification */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the timing parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the timing parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value for the timing parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the timing parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit for the timing parameter */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments regarding the timing parameter */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing category the specification belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the digital component the specification is for */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the specification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_specifications_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES digital_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_specifications_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES timing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the timing category (e.g., Clock Timing, Data Timing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the timing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "digital_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the digital component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the digital component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the digital component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the digital component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timing report */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing specification the report is based on */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the timing report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_reports_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES timing_specifications ("spec_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager, quality assurance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timing_specification_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change record */,
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the timing specification that was changed */,
  "changed_field" TEXT /* Field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_specification_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timing_specification_history_spec_id FOREIGN KEY ("spec_id") REFERENCES timing_specifications ("spec_id")
)
